title: Authenticator
body:
Simple 2 factor authentication (2fa) mod.

# How To Use?
- Save your secret with `/authenticator create <secret> <name>`
  - ex: `/authenticator create 8YSD26F87CV9 Modrinth`
- Get your 2FA code with `/authenticator getCode <name>`
  - ex: `/authenticator getCode Modrinth`
### Or
- press `g` (by default) and open GUI

# Plans
UI enhancements
edit & delete command args

# NOTE
This mod made in 1.20.4 and didn't tested on older versions.

This is a Fabric mod will **NOT** work with Forge.
